title: RCT of aspirin in acute MI
abstract: A randomised controlled trial of aspirin 300mg vs placebo in 500 adults with acute myocardial infarction. 30-day mortality was the primary outcome. Aspirin reduced mortality (OR 0.72, 95%CI 0.55-0.94).
reasoning: Clearly a RCT of aspirin in MI with mortality outcome matching PICO.

title: Observational study of statin use
abstract: Retrospective cohort examining statin prescriptions in primary care. No randomisation, no control group. Confounding by indication likely.
reasoning: Observational design does not meet RCT inclusion criterion.

title: Aspirin for primary prevention in diabetes
abstract: Randomised trial of low-dose aspirin versus placebo in 1000 diabetic patients without prior CVD. Composite endpoint of MI, stroke, death. Aspirin showed no significant benefit.
reasoning: RCT of aspirin with relevant outcomes even though population differs slightly.

title: Systematic review of antiplatelet therapy
abstract: Meta-analysis of 45 trials of antiplatelet agents post-MI. Aspirin, clopidogrel, ticagrelor compared. Includes only RCTs with mortality endpoints.
reasoning: Secondary study (meta-analysis), not a primary RCT.

title: Beta-blocker therapy post-MI
abstract: Multicentre RCT of metoprolol versus placebo in 800 post-MI patients. 6-month all-cause mortality primary endpoint. Metoprolol significantly reduced mortality.
reasoning: Intervention is beta-blocker not aspirin, does not match PICO intervention.
